blended.narrative: Whitefish Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.1 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,476 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 3.8" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 15.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 11" over the past week. Current depth: 48".
